channel.title: Backstage on OpenSwap Guide
channel.description: Recent content in Backstage on OpenSwap Guide

item.title: Complete Guide to Self-Hosted Developer Portals: Backstage and Beyond 2026
item.description: Every growing engineering team eventually hits the same wall: too many services, too many repositories, scattered documentation, inconsistent tooling, and onboarding new developers takes weeks instead of days. A developer portal solves this by providing a single pane of glass for all your internal services, APIs, documentation, and tooling.
